001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020
021import java.lang.annotation.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.encoders.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.logger.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile.*;
036import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger.*;
037
038/**
039 * Utility classes and methods for the {@link Rest @Rest} annotation.
040 *
041 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
042 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/RestAnnotatedClassBasics">@Rest-Annotated Class Basics</a>
043 * </ul>
044 */
045public class RestAnnotation {
046
047   /**
048    * Prevents instantiation.
049    */
050   private RestAnnotation() {}
051
052   /**
053    * Builder class.
054    *
055    * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
056    *    <li class='jm'>{@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContext.Builder#annotations(Annotation...)}
057    * </ul>
058    */
059   @SuppressWarnings({
060      "unchecked" // Type erasure requires cast for Builder inheritance
061   })
062   public static class Builder extends AnnotationObject.Builder {
063
064      private String[] description = {};
065      private Class<? extends Encoder>[] encoders = new Class[0];
066      private Class<? extends HttpPartParser> partParser = HttpPartParser.Void.class;
067      private Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer> partSerializer = HttpPartSerializer.Void.class;
068      private Class<? extends StaticFiles> staticFiles = StaticFiles.Void.class;
069      private Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>[] responseProcessors = new Class[0];
070      private Class<? extends CallLogger> callLogger = CallLogger.Void.class;
071      private Class<? extends RestAuthenticator> authenticator = RestAuthenticator.Null.class;
072      private Class<? extends RestConverter>[] converters = new Class[0];
073      private Class<? extends RestGuard>[] guards = new Class[0];
074      private Class<? extends SwaggerProvider> swaggerProvider = SwaggerProvider.Void.class;
075      private Class<? extends OpenApiProvider> openApiProvider = OpenApiProvider.Void.class;
076      private Class<? extends RestOpArg>[] restOpArgs = new Class[0];
077      private Debug debug = DebugAnnotation.DEFAULT;
078      private Class<? extends Serializer>[] serializers = new Class[0];
079      private Class<?>[] children = {};
080      private Class<?>[] mixins = {};
081      private Mixin[] mixinDefs = {};
082      private Class<?>[] parsers = {};
083      private Swagger swagger = SwaggerAnnotation.DEFAULT;
084      private String disableContentParam = "";
085      private String allowedHeaderParams = "";
086      private String allowedMethodHeaders = "";
087      private String allowedMethodParams = "";
088      private String clientVersionHeader = "";
089      private String config = "";
090      private String eagerInit = "";
091      private String lazyChildren = "";
092      private String defaultAccept = "";
093      private String defaultCharset = "";
094      private String defaultContentType = "";
095      private String maxInput = "";
096      private String messages = "";
097      private String path = "";
098      private String[] paths = {};
099      private String observability = "";
100      private String problemDetails = "";
101      private String virtualThreads = "";
102      private String asyncTimeoutMillis = "";
103      private String asyncCompletionExecutor = "";
104      private String renderResponseStackTraces = "";
105      private String roleGuard = "";
106      private String rolesDeclared = "";
107      private String siteName = "";
108      private String uriAuthority = "";
109      private String uriContext = "";
110      private String uriRelativity = "";
111      private String uriResolution = "";
112      private String[] allowedParserOptions = {};
113      private String[] allowedSerializerOptions = {};
114      private String[] noInherit = {};
115      private String[] consumes = {};
116      private String[] defaultRequestAttributes = {};
117      private String[] defaultRequestHeaders = {};
118      private String[] defaultResponseHeaders = {};
119      private String[] produces = {};
120      private String[] title = {};
121      private Query[] queryParams = new Query[0];
122      private Header[] headerParams = new Header[0];
123      private Path[] pathParams = new Path[0];
124      private FormData[] formDataParams = new FormData[0];
125
126      /**
127       * Constructor.
128       */
129      protected Builder() {
130         super(Rest.class);
131      }
132
133      /**
134       * Sets the {@link Rest#allowedHeaderParams()} property on this annotation.
135       *
136       * @param value The new value for this property.
137       * @return This object.
138       */
139      public Builder allowedHeaderParams(String value) {
140         allowedHeaderParams = value;
141         return this;
142      }
143
144      /**
145       * Sets the {@link Rest#allowedMethodHeaders()} property on this annotation.
146       *
147       * @param value The new value for this property.
148       * @return This object.
149       */
150      public Builder allowedMethodHeaders(String value) {
151         allowedMethodHeaders = value;
152         return this;
153      }
154
155      /**
156       * Sets the {@link Rest#allowedMethodParams()} property on this annotation.
157       *
158       * @param value The new value for this property.
159       * @return This object.
160       */
161      public Builder allowedMethodParams(String value) {
162         allowedMethodParams = value;
163         return this;
164      }
165
166      /**
167       * Instantiates a new {@link Rest @Rest} object initialized with this builder.
168       *
169       * @return A new {@link Rest @Rest} object.
170       */
171      public Rest build() {
172         return new Object(this);
173      }
174
175      /**
176       * Sets the description property on this annotation.
177       *
178       * @param value The new value for this property.
179       * @return This object.
180       */
181      public Builder description(String...value) {
182         description = value;
183         return this;
184      }
185
186      /**
187       * Sets the {@link Rest#callLogger()} property on this annotation.
188       *
189       * @param value The new value for this property.
190       * @return This object.
191       */
192      public Builder callLogger(Class<? extends CallLogger> value) {
193         callLogger = value;
194         return this;
195      }
196
197      /**
198       * Sets the {@link Rest#authenticator()} property on this annotation.
199       *
200       * @param value The new value for this property.
201       * @return This object.
202       */
203      public Builder authenticator(Class<? extends RestAuthenticator> value) {
204         authenticator = value;
205         return this;
206      }
207
208      /**
209       * Sets the {@link Rest#children()} property on this annotation.
210       *
211       * @param value The new value for this property.
212       * @return This object.
213       */
214      public Builder children(Class<?>...value) {
215         children = value;
216         return this;
217      }
218
219      /**
220       * Sets the {@link Rest#mixins()} property on this annotation.
221       *
222       * @param value The new value for this property.
223       * @return This object.
224       */
225      public Builder mixins(Class<?>...value) {
226         mixins = value;
227         return this;
228      }
229
230      /**
231       * Sets the {@link Rest#mixinDefs()} property on this annotation.
232       *
233       * @param value The new value for this property.
234       * @return This object.
235       */
236      public Builder mixinDefs(Mixin...value) {
237         mixinDefs = value;
238         return this;
239      }
240
241      /**
242       * Sets the {@link Rest#clientVersionHeader()} property on this annotation.
243       *
244       * @param value The new value for this property.
245       * @return This object.
246       */
247      public Builder clientVersionHeader(String value) {
248         clientVersionHeader = value;
249         return this;
250      }
251
252      /**
253       * Sets the {@link Rest#config()} property on this annotation.
254       *
255       * @param value The new value for this property.
256       * @return This object.
257       */
258      public Builder config(String value) {
259         config = value;
260         return this;
261      }
262
263      /**
264       * Sets the {@link Rest#eagerInit()} property on this annotation.
265       *
266       * @param value The new value for this property.
267       * @return This object.
268       */
269      public Builder eagerInit(String value) {
270         eagerInit = value;
271         return this;
272      }
273
274      /**
275       * Sets the {@link Rest#lazyChildren()} property on this annotation.
276       *
277       * @param value The new value for this property.
278       * @return This object.
279       */
280      public Builder lazyChildren(String value) {
281         lazyChildren = value;
282         return this;
283      }
284
285      /**
286       * Sets the {@link Rest#consumes()} property on this annotation.
287       *
288       * @param value The new value for this property.
289       * @return This object.
290       */
291      public Builder consumes(String...value) {
292         consumes = value;
293         return this;
294      }
295
296      /**
297       * Sets the {@link Rest#allowedSerializerOptions()} property on this annotation.
298       *
299       * @param value The new value for this property.
300       * @return This object.
301       */
302      public Builder allowedSerializerOptions(String...value) {
303         allowedSerializerOptions = value;
304         return this;
305      }
306
307      /**
308       * Sets the {@link Rest#allowedParserOptions()} property on this annotation.
309       *
310       * @param value The new value for this property.
311       * @return This object.
312       */
313      public Builder allowedParserOptions(String...value) {
314         allowedParserOptions = value;
315         return this;
316      }
317
318      /**
319       * Sets the {@link Rest#noInherit()} property on this annotation.
320       *
321       * @param value The new value for this property.
322       * @return This object.
323       */
324      public Builder noInherit(String...value) {
325         noInherit = value;
326         return this;
327      }
328
329      /**
330       * Sets the {@link Rest#converters()} property on this annotation.
331       *
332       * @param value The new value for this property.
333       * @return This object.
334       */
335      @SafeVarargs
336      public final Builder converters(Class<? extends RestConverter>...value) {
337         converters = value;
338         return this;
339      }
340
341      /**
342       * Sets the {@link Rest#debug()} property on this annotation.
343       *
344       * @param value The new value for this property.
345       * @return This object.
346       */
347      public Builder debug(String value) {
348         debug = DebugAnnotation.create().value(value).build();
349         return this;
350      }
351
352      /**
353       * Sets the {@link Rest#debug()} property on this annotation.
354       *
355       * @param value The new value for this property.
356       * @return This object.
357       */
358      public Builder debug(Debug value) {
359         debug = value == null ? DebugAnnotation.DEFAULT : value;
360         return this;
361      }
362
363      /**
364       * Sets the {@link Rest#defaultAccept()} property on this annotation.
365       *
366       * @param value The new value for this property.
367       * @return This object.
368       */
369      public Builder defaultAccept(String value) {
370         defaultAccept = value;
371         return this;
372      }
373
374      /**
375       * Sets the {@link Rest#defaultCharset()} property on this annotation.
376       *
377       * @param value The new value for this property.
378       * @return This object.
379       */
380      public Builder defaultCharset(String value) {
381         defaultCharset = value;
382         return this;
383      }
384
385      /**
386       * Sets the {@link Rest#defaultContentType()} property on this annotation.
387       *
388       * @param value The new value for this property.
389       * @return This object.
390       */
391      public Builder defaultContentType(String value) {
392         defaultContentType = value;
393         return this;
394      }
395
396      /**
397       * Sets the {@link Rest#defaultRequestAttributes()} property on this annotation.
398       *
399       * @param value The new value for this property.
400       * @return This object.
401       */
402      public Builder defaultRequestAttributes(String...value) {
403         defaultRequestAttributes = value;
404         return this;
405      }
406
407      /**
408       * Sets the {@link Rest#defaultRequestHeaders()} property on this annotation.
409       *
410       * @param value The new value for this property.
411       * @return This object.
412       */
413      public Builder defaultRequestHeaders(String...value) {
414         defaultRequestHeaders = value;
415         return this;
416      }
417
418      /**
419       * Sets the {@link Rest#defaultResponseHeaders()} property on this annotation.
420       *
421       * @param value The new value for this property.
422       * @return This object.
423       */
424      public Builder defaultResponseHeaders(String...value) {
425         defaultResponseHeaders = value;
426         return this;
427      }
428
429      /**
430       * Sets the {@link Rest#disableContentParam()} property on this annotation.
431       *
432       * @param value The new value for this property.
433       * @return This object.
434       */
435      public Builder disableContentParam(String value) {
436         disableContentParam = value;
437         return this;
438      }
439
440      /**
441       * Sets the {@link Rest#encoders()} property on this annotation.
442       *
443       * @param value The new value for this property.
444       * @return This object.
445       */
446      @SafeVarargs
447      public final Builder encoders(Class<? extends Encoder>...value) {
448         encoders = value;
449         return this;
450      }
451
452      /**
453       * Sets the {@link Rest#guards()} property on this annotation.
454       *
455       * @param value The new value for this property.
456       * @return This object.
457       */
458      @SafeVarargs
459      public final Builder guards(Class<? extends RestGuard>...value) {
460         guards = value;
461         return this;
462      }
463
464      /**
465       * Sets the {@link Rest#maxInput()} property on this annotation.
466       *
467       * @param value The new value for this property.
468       * @return This object.
469       */
470      public Builder maxInput(String value) {
471         maxInput = value;
472         return this;
473      }
474
475      /**
476       * Sets the {@link Rest#messages()} property on this annotation.
477       *
478       * @param value The new value for this property.
479       * @return This object.
480       */
481      public Builder messages(String value) {
482         messages = value;
483         return this;
484      }
485
486      /**
487       * Sets the {@link Rest#parsers()} property on this annotation.
488       *
489       * @param value The new value for this property.
490       * @return This object.
491       */
492      public Builder parsers(Class<?>...value) {
493         parsers = value;
494         return this;
495      }
496
497      /**
498       * Sets the {@link Rest#partParser()} property on this annotation.
499       *
500       * @param value The new value for this property.
501       * @return This object.
502       */
503      public Builder partParser(Class<? extends HttpPartParser> value) {
504         partParser = value;
505         return this;
506      }
507
508      /**
509       * Sets the {@link Rest#partSerializer()} property on this annotation.
510       *
511       * @param value The new value for this property.
512       * @return This object.
513       */
514      public Builder partSerializer(Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer> value) {
515         partSerializer = value;
516         return this;
517      }
518
519      /**
520       * Sets the {@link Rest#path()} property on this annotation.
521       *
522       * @param value The new value for this property.
523       * @return This object.
524       */
525      public Builder path(String value) {
526         path = value;
527         return this;
528      }
529
530      /**
531       * Sets the {@link Rest#paths()} property on this annotation.
532       *
533       * @param value The new value for this property.
534       * @return This object.
535       */
536      public Builder paths(String...value) {
537         paths = value;
538         return this;
539      }
540
541      /**
542       * Sets the {@link Rest#produces()} property on this annotation.
543       *
544       * @param value The new value for this property.
545       * @return This object.
546       */
547      public Builder produces(String...value) {
548         produces = value;
549         return this;
550      }
551
552      /**
553       * Sets the {@link Rest#problemDetails()} property on this annotation.
554       *
555       * @param value The new value for this property.
556       * @return This object.
557       */
558      public Builder problemDetails(String value) {
559         problemDetails = value;
560         return this;
561      }
562
563      /**
564       * Sets the {@link Rest#observability()} property on this annotation.
565       *
566       * @param value The new value for this property.
567       * @return This object.
568       */
569      public Builder observability(String value) {
570         observability = value;
571         return this;
572      }
573
574      /**
575       * Sets the {@link Rest#virtualThreads()} property on this annotation.
576       *
577       * @param value The new value for this property.
578       * @return This object.
579       */
580      public Builder virtualThreads(String value) {
581         virtualThreads = value;
582         return this;
583      }
584
585      /**
586       * Sets the {@link Rest#asyncTimeoutMillis()} property on this annotation.
587       *
588       * @param value The new value for this property.
589       * @return This object.
590       */
591      public Builder asyncTimeoutMillis(String value) {
592         asyncTimeoutMillis = value;
593         return this;
594      }
595
596      /**
597       * Sets the {@link Rest#asyncCompletionExecutor()} property on this annotation.
598       *
599       * @param value The new value for this property.
600       * @return This object.
601       */
602      public Builder asyncCompletionExecutor(String value) {
603         asyncCompletionExecutor = value;
604         return this;
605      }
606
607      /**
608       * Sets the {@link Rest#renderResponseStackTraces()} property on this annotation.
609       *
610       * @param value The new value for this property.
611       * @return This object.
612       */
613      public Builder renderResponseStackTraces(String value) {
614         renderResponseStackTraces = value;
615         return this;
616      }
617
618      /**
619       * Sets the {@link Rest#responseProcessors()} property on this annotation.
620       *
621       * @param value The new value for this property.
622       * @return This object.
623       */
624      @SafeVarargs
625      public final Builder responseProcessors(Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>...value) {
626         responseProcessors = value;
627         return this;
628      }
629
630      /**
631       * Sets the {@link Rest#restOpArgs()} property on this annotation.
632       *
633       * @param value The new value for this property.
634       * @return This object.
635       */
636      @SafeVarargs
637      public final Builder restOpArgs(Class<? extends RestOpArg>...value) {
638         restOpArgs = value;
639         return this;
640      }
641
642      /**
643       * Sets the {@link Rest#roleGuard()} property on this annotation.
644       *
645       * @param value The new value for this property.
646       * @return This object.
647       */
648      public Builder roleGuard(String value) {
649         roleGuard = value;
650         return this;
651      }
652
653      /**
654       * Sets the {@link Rest#rolesDeclared()} property on this annotation.
655       *
656       * @param value The new value for this property.
657       * @return This object.
658       */
659      public Builder rolesDeclared(String value) {
660         rolesDeclared = value;
661         return this;
662      }
663
664      /**
665       * Sets the {@link Rest#serializers()} property on this annotation.
666       *
667       * @param value The new value for this property.
668       * @return This object.
669       */
670      @SafeVarargs
671      public final Builder serializers(Class<? extends Serializer>...value) {
672         serializers = value;
673         return this;
674      }
675
676      /**
677       * Sets the {@link Rest#siteName()} property on this annotation.
678       *
679       * @param value The new value for this property.
680       * @return This object.
681       */
682      public Builder siteName(String value) {
683         siteName = value;
684         return this;
685      }
686
687      /**
688       * Sets the {@link Rest#staticFiles()} property on this annotation.
689       *
690       * @param value The new value for this property.
691       * @return This object.
692       */
693      public Builder staticFiles(Class<? extends StaticFiles> value) {
694         staticFiles = value;
695         return this;
696      }
697
698      /**
699       * Sets the {@link Rest#swagger()} property on this annotation.
700       *
701       * @param value The new value for this property.
702       * @return This object.
703       */
704      public Builder swagger(Swagger value) {
705         swagger = value;
706         return this;
707      }
708
709      /**
710       * Sets the {@link Rest#swaggerProvider()} property on this annotation.
711       *
712       * @param value The new value for this property.
713       * @return This object.
714       */
715      public Builder swaggerProvider(Class<? extends SwaggerProvider> value) {
716         swaggerProvider = value;
717         return this;
718      }
719
720      /**
721       * Sets the {@link Rest#openApiProvider()} property on this annotation.
722       *
723       * @param value The new value for this property.
724       * @return This object.
725       */
726      public Builder openApiProvider(Class<? extends OpenApiProvider> value) {
727         openApiProvider = value;
728         return this;
729      }
730
731      /**
732       * Sets the {@link Rest#title()} property on this annotation.
733       *
734       * @param value The new value for this property.
735       * @return This object.
736       */
737      public Builder title(String...value) {
738         title = value;
739         return this;
740      }
741
742      /**
743       * Sets the {@link Rest#uriAuthority()} property on this annotation.
744       *
745       * @param value The new value for this property.
746       * @return This object.
747       */
748      public Builder uriAuthority(String value) {
749         uriAuthority = value;
750         return this;
751      }
752
753      /**
754       * Sets the {@link Rest#uriContext()} property on this annotation.
755       *
756       * @param value The new value for this property.
757       * @return This object.
758       */
759      public Builder uriContext(String value) {
760         uriContext = value;
761         return this;
762      }
763
764      /**
765       * Sets the {@link Rest#uriRelativity()} property on this annotation.
766       *
767       * @param value The new value for this property.
768       * @return This object.
769       */
770      public Builder uriRelativity(String value) {
771         uriRelativity = value;
772         return this;
773      }
774
775      /**
776       * Sets the {@link Rest#uriResolution()} property on this annotation.
777       *
778       * @param value The new value for this property.
779       * @return This object.
780       */
781      public Builder uriResolution(String value) {
782         uriResolution = value;
783         return this;
784      }
785
786   }
787
788   @SuppressWarnings({
789      "java:S2160" // equals() inherited from AnnotationObject compares all annotation interface methods; subclass fields are accessed via those methods
790   })
791   private static class Object extends AnnotationObject implements Rest {
792
793      private final String[] description;
794      private final Class<? extends Encoder>[] encoders;
795      private final Class<? extends HttpPartParser> partParser;
796      private final Class<? extends HttpPartSerializer> partSerializer;
797      private final Class<? extends StaticFiles> staticFiles;
798      private final Class<? extends ResponseProcessor>[] responseProcessors;
799      private final Class<? extends CallLogger> callLogger;
800      private final Class<? extends RestAuthenticator> authenticator;
801      private final Class<? extends RestConverter>[] converters;
802      private final Class<? extends RestGuard>[] guards;
803      private final Class<? extends SwaggerProvider> swaggerProvider;
804      private final Class<? extends OpenApiProvider> openApiProvider;
805      private final Class<? extends RestOpArg>[] restOpArgs;
806      private final Debug debug;
807      private final Class<? extends Serializer>[] serializers;
808      private final Class<?>[] children;
809      private final Class<?>[] mixins;
810      private final Mixin[] mixinDefs;
811      private final Class<?>[] parsers;
812      private final Swagger swagger;
813      private final String disableContentParam;
814      private final String allowedHeaderParams;
815      private final String allowedMethodHeaders;
816      private final String allowedMethodParams;
817      private final String clientVersionHeader;
818      private final String config;
819      private final String eagerInit;
820      private final String lazyChildren;
821      private final String defaultAccept;
822      private final String defaultCharset;
823      private final String defaultContentType;
824      private final String maxInput;
825      private final String messages;
826      private final String path;
827      private final String[] paths;
828      private final String observability;
829      private final String problemDetails;
830      private final String virtualThreads;
831      private final String asyncTimeoutMillis;
832      private final String asyncCompletionExecutor;
833      private final String renderResponseStackTraces;
834      private final String roleGuard;
835      private final String rolesDeclared;
836      private final String siteName;
837      private final String uriAuthority;
838      private final String uriContext;
839      private final String uriRelativity;
840      private final String uriResolution;
841      private final String[] allowedParserOptions;
842      private final String[] allowedSerializerOptions;
843      private final String[] noInherit;
844      private final String[] consumes;
845      private final String[] produces;
846      private final String[] defaultRequestAttributes;
847      private final String[] defaultRequestHeaders;
848      private final String[] defaultResponserHeaders;
849      private final String[] title;
850      private final Query[] queryParams;
851      private final Header[] headerParams;
852      private final Path[] pathParams;
853      private final FormData[] formDataParams;
854
855      Object(RestAnnotation.Builder b) {
856         super(b);
857         description = copyOf(b.description);
858         disableContentParam = b.disableContentParam;
859         allowedHeaderParams = b.allowedHeaderParams;
860         allowedMethodHeaders = b.allowedMethodHeaders;
861         allowedMethodParams = b.allowedMethodParams;
862         callLogger = b.callLogger;
863         authenticator = b.authenticator;
864         children = copyOf(b.children);
865         mixins = copyOf(b.mixins);
866         mixinDefs = copyOf(b.mixinDefs);
867         clientVersionHeader = b.clientVersionHeader;
868         config = b.config;
869         eagerInit = b.eagerInit;
870         lazyChildren = b.lazyChildren;
871         allowedParserOptions = copyOf(b.allowedParserOptions);
872         allowedSerializerOptions = copyOf(b.allowedSerializerOptions);
873         noInherit = copyOf(b.noInherit);
874         consumes = copyOf(b.consumes);
875         converters = copyOf(b.converters);
876         debug = b.debug;
877         defaultAccept = b.defaultAccept;
878         defaultCharset = b.defaultCharset;
879         defaultContentType = b.defaultContentType;
880         defaultRequestAttributes = copyOf(b.defaultRequestAttributes);
881         defaultRequestHeaders = copyOf(b.defaultRequestHeaders);
882         defaultResponserHeaders = copyOf(b.defaultResponseHeaders);
883         encoders = copyOf(b.encoders);
884         guards = copyOf(b.guards);
885         maxInput = b.maxInput;
886         messages = b.messages;
887         parsers = copyOf(b.parsers);
888         partParser = b.partParser;
889         partSerializer = b.partSerializer;
890         path = b.path;
891         paths = copyOf(b.paths);
892         observability = b.observability;
893         problemDetails = b.problemDetails;
894         virtualThreads = b.virtualThreads;
895         asyncTimeoutMillis = b.asyncTimeoutMillis;
896         asyncCompletionExecutor = b.asyncCompletionExecutor;
897         produces = copyOf(b.produces);
898         renderResponseStackTraces = b.renderResponseStackTraces;
899         responseProcessors = copyOf(b.responseProcessors);
900         restOpArgs = copyOf(b.restOpArgs);
901         roleGuard = b.roleGuard;
902         rolesDeclared = b.rolesDeclared;
903         serializers = copyOf(b.serializers);
904         siteName = b.siteName;
905         staticFiles = b.staticFiles;
906         swagger = b.swagger;
907         swaggerProvider = b.swaggerProvider;
908         openApiProvider = b.openApiProvider;
909         title = copyOf(b.title);
910         uriAuthority = b.uriAuthority;
911         uriContext = b.uriContext;
912         uriRelativity = b.uriRelativity;
913         uriResolution = b.uriResolution;
914         queryParams = copyOf(b.queryParams);
915         headerParams = copyOf(b.headerParams);
916         pathParams = copyOf(b.pathParams);
917         formDataParams = copyOf(b.formDataParams);
918      }
919

1225
1226   /** Default value */
1227   public static final Rest DEFAULT = create().build();
1228
1229   /**
1230    * Instantiates a new builder for this class.
1231    *
1232    * @return A new builder object.
1233    */
1234   public static Builder create() {
1235      return new Builder();
1236   }
1237
1238}
